title: taraxacum ciliatum
intro: Taraxacum ciliatum, also known as the ciliate dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum ciliatum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate digestive issues, and support the liver and kidneys. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, often used to treat various health conditions, including fever and skin irritations.
